case left.h
f g : ℝ → ℂ
hf : Meromorphic f
hg : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ g univ
a : ℝ
⊢ MeasureTheory.Integrable (fun y => log ‖f a - g y‖) (MeasureTheory.volume.restrict (Ioc 0 (2 * Real.pi)))

failed_attempts:
rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le Real.two_pi_pos.le]
    rw [← norm_neg (f a - g _), neg_sub]
    exact hg.intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub _ _ _
  · sorry

refine (MeasureTheory.LocallyIntegrable.integrableOn_isCompact isCompact_Icc ?_).mono_set Ioc_subset_Icc_self
    intro y
    rw [norm_sub_rev]
    apply AnalyticAt.locallyIntegrable_log_norm
    fun_prop

apply IntervalIntegrable.integrableOn
    apply AnalyticOnNhd.intervalIntegrable_log_norm
    · exact hg.sub (analyticOnNhd_const (f a))
    · simp

rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le (by positivity)]
    have : AnalyticOnNhd ℝ (fun x ↦ f a - g x) Set.univ := by fun_prop
    exact this.intervalIntegrable_log_norm 0 (2 * π)

apply IntervalIntegrable.integrableOn_Ioc
    · positivity
    · exact hg.intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub (f a) 0 (2 * π)

rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le Real.two_pi_pos.le]
    exact hg.intervalIntegrable_log_norm_sub (f a) 0 (2 * π)

rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le (by positivity)]

    exact (hg.sub_const (f a)).intervalIntegrable_log_norm 0 (2 * π)
  · sorry

rw [← MeasureTheory.intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le (by positivity)]
    simp_rw [norm_sub_rev]
    exact (hg.sub_const (f a)).intervalIntegrable_log_norm 0 (2 * π)

exact (hg.sub_const (f a)).intervalIntegrable_log_norm
  · filter_upwards with b
    exact (hf.sub_const (g b)).intervalIntegrable_log_norm

rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le Real.two_pi_pos.le, norm_sub_rev]

rw [← intervalIntegrable_iff_integrable_Ioc_of_le Real.two_pi_pos.le]
